title: メソッドとして呼び出す

input.factory: () => ({ name: "朝の読書", minutes: 20, getSummary() { return this.name + "は" + this.minutes + "分です"; } })

cases.name: 別の予定でも同じメソッドを呼ぶ

input.factory: () => ({ name: "昼休み", minutes: 45, getSummary() { return this.name + "は" + this.minutes + "分です"; } })
() => ({ name: "待ち時間", minutes: 0, getSummary() { return this.name + "は" + this.minutes + "分です"; } })
